title: Mild and Chemoselective Phosphorylation of Alcohols Using a Ψ-Reagent
author: Ociepa, Michał
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An operationally simple, scalable, and chemoselective method for the direct phosphorylation of alcohols using a P(V)-approach based on the Ψ-reagent platform is disclosed. The method features a broad substrate scope of utility in both simple and complex settings and provides access to valuable phosphorylated alcohols that would be otherwise difficult to obtain.
steps_raw: An operationally simple, scalable, and chemoselective method for the direct phosphorylation of alcohols using a P(V)-approach based on the Ψ-reagent platform is disclosed. The method features a broad substrate scope of utility in both simple and complex settings and provides access to valuable phosphorylated alcohols that would be otherwise difficult to obtain.
